title: Senior Financial Analyst - IIFL Finance - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - IIFL Finance - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
IIFL Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Vadodara. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About IIFL Finance:
IIFL Finance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIFL Finance!
